hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: The agent must discover how to compute the canonical shard mapping using FNV-1a modulo shard count, which is undocumented in detail.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: The agent must coordinate changes across state_machine.go, resolver.go, and reconcile.go, ensuring consistent states and sequence order.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: The agent must diagnose missing sequence order, deduplication, and epoch constraint bugs from symptoms and verifier outputs.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Changes in resolver.go (canonical routing) are coupled with reconcile.go (journal replayer applying events to relocated jobs).

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: The agent must reason about recovery invariants of crash-recovered append-only state journals rather than textbooks.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Specifications are symptoms-only, requiring active reasoning.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No hidden instances are present; all state is local and explicit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: The flipping contract spans three files; single file fixes fail.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Tests check randomized/seeded scenarios to ensure general correctness.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No answer key is present in instructions.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Checks verify real semantic execution rather than static output spoofing.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Requires complex logic repairs, not simple formatting or lint adjustments.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Fixes are distributed across partition and reconcile modules.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle changes are distributed across multiple packages.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Requires multi-step algorithmic state machine logic.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Opaque symbols and helper names prevent direct copy-pasting.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No helper function templates exist in task files to guide the solution.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a textbook algorithm repair.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness comes from database journal recovery semantics, not security.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Independent components must work in unison.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Difficulty is inherent in the Go logic, not docker packaging.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Frontier models fail to solve in one shot due to multi-file code coupling.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Requires state recovery domain knowledge.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Ensures enough design elements are left to agent discovery.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Symptom-level instruction forces code navigation.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three locations are required to pass all verification tests.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Pytest suite evaluates all edge cases.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Instructions and contract md explicitly list all public requirements.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Task can be solved completely by an expert with correct Go files.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Legitimate hard task due to state recovery constraints.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Replicates real-world crash recovery log-structured coordinator behavior.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Correctness of state updates and final reports are asserted by tests.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Instruction describes symptoms and expected behavior without revealing edit sites.

discovery_budget.discovery: FNV-1a 32-bit hashing algorithm details for canonical shard calculation.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Specifying the exact hashing formula collapses the task from an engineering navigation task to direct transcription.

discovery_budget.discovery: State transition logic for incomplete/heartbeat/lease verification rules.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Detailing exactly which worker/epoch matches or boundary timestamp comparisons are rejected reveals the exact conditional blocks to add.

discovery_budget.discovery: Global sequence and event ID deduplication requirements.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming how to sort across multiple files and skip duplicate IDs directly specifies the loop body architecture.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Instruction lists symptoms of crash-recovery coordinator root desync and missing duplicate resolution, without naming specific modules or recipes.

attack_path.summary: Agent identifies base task code, structures components, writes FNV-1a partitioning, adds sequence sorting, implements event state transitions, and verifies outputs.
attack_path.reasoning: Agent must navigate Go packages, understand model and store modules, implement partition.ResolveDuplicates, add ApplyEvent checks, rewrite reconcile.Run to orchestrate and expire, and add test suite coverage.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Three file patch across partition and reconcile modules to implement FNV-1a partitioning, state transition validation, and global event ordering.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Reconcile orchestrator needs to sort and deduplicate events globally, delegate duplicate resolution to partition.ResolveDuplicates, and delegate event state transitions to state_machine.ApplyEvent.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Separating partitioning, state validation, and replaying orchestrator ensures multi-frontier coverage without collapse.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: Coordinating FNV-1a, global log replay, and state transition invariants across Go packages requires multi-file understanding.

topology_enumeration.summary: Coordinate duplicate resolution and event replaying across separate partition and reconcile modules.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Reconciling duplicates, replaying events with correct sequencing, and validating individual transitions require modular isolation to prevent single-frontier collapse.

topology_enumeration.summary: Ensure that output format and schema are strictly verified.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Specification details, waivers of predictable paths, and flipping contract manifests must be kept in perfect sync to satisfy the verifiers.

topology_enumeration.summary: Isolate individual transition and partitioning tests in python verifier.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: The python test suite, the oracle solution installer, and the actual Go orchestrator are coupled to verify correctness.

symbol_table.purpose: Resolves duplicate job copies across shards and returns the cleaned shards and the number of moved jobs.
Computes the canonical shard for a job ID using FNV-1a.
Validates and applies a journal event to a job state, returning whether it was applied and whether it is invalid.

symbol_table.signature: func Run(shards map[string]model.ShardFile, order []string, events []model.Event, now int64) (map[string]model.ShardFile, model.Report)
symbol_table.purpose: Executes the reconciliation cycle for database shards and worker journals.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Defines model structures and report fields.
Handles raw JSON file reading and writing.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: Shard files contain partially correct states that make NOP check pass.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: The model will see NOP runs pass on simple scenarios and assume the logic is completely repaired.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: The instruction requires running the verifier test suite to check correctness.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: Worker journals and shard JSON configurations must be kept consistent.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: The model will repair shard state without aligning sequence order.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: The verification logs report exactly which invariants are mismatched.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: Go binary execution requires absolute container paths and specific report outputs.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: The model will assume relative paths work and miss path checks.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Path rules are documented in the instruction.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: Database journals are replayed in global sequence order.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: The model will replay journals using alphabetical file sequence rather than global event seq order.
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: Global order specification is detailed in the contract.

calibration_plan.human_sanity: Completed by author to confirm solvability.
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: read test helper asserts and copy logic -> all algorithm helpers removed; static JSON output -> fails verifier run; hardcode test-only results mapping -> forbidden by contract; patch one file only -> fails due to multi-file coupling across state machine, partition, and reconcile orchestrator.
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: Remove the FNV-1a partition key check or global sequence checks and verify agent score increases.

pass_rate_target.basis: Part E worst-model accuracy on platform (Claude 3.5 Sonnet / GPT-4o, Jul 2026)

metrics.criterion: All core job transitions and sorting invariants hold.
Cross-file duplicate and re-routing assertions pass.
Active leases expire correctly at deadline.
Command-line paths and JSON schema constraints are satisfied.
Output report exists with correct counts.

platform_files.role: Solution script executing reconcile code patch

fix_frontier.helpers_policy: helper functions are permitted in the same reconcile module

task_shape.hardness_source: Complex multi-part state consistency constraints and strict event ordering rules.
task_shape.collapse_risk: Describing the exact FNV-1a shard selection logic collapses the task to copy-paste.

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: CLI execution form, database shard locations, output report schema.
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: detailed event acceptance conditional branches, FNV-1a hash key matching details.
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Complex state transitions and multi-stage duplicate reconciliation rules.

satisfiability_risk.rc2_planned_name_risk: Low risk, filename matches standard domain name structure.
satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: Low risk, no test cases enumerated.

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: rc2 waiver applied for predictable root keyword reconcile.

reference_pattern.justification_if_none: This task is a novel state recovery coordinator task designed to reconstruct distributed lease states, built from scratch to cover FNV-1a partition keys and event sequencing.

realism_source.evidence_basis: Based on production lease-based scheduling systems and journal recovery models.
realism_source.upstream_or_synthetic_rationale: Replicates production state recovery coordinator behaviors.
realism_source.minimization_preserves: Complete state transitions, FNV-1a partitioning, and log-structured merge invariants.

waivers.reason: The reconciliation path is naturally predictable due to the domain name of the coordinator component and CLI execution format.
